title: Compress the call to its single most important finding bullet
guidance: Reward the bullet that packs the most decision-relevant content into the fewest words and reads like a partner wrote it. Penalise padding, vagueness, or an AI 'feel'.

runner_input.instruction: Capture the essence of the material below in a single bullet for an IC slide.
runner_input.constraints: Output: exactly one markdown bullet (start with '- '). Max 30 words. No title, no second bullet.

source_blocks.text: [Synthetic management call — Northwind] CFO: Growth's been great, 38%, and the fraud model is a real differentiator now. Fund: Concentration? CFO: Top five are about 41% of volume; two are on rolling annual contracts. CEO: Honestly the thing keeping me up is interchange — if the review lands badly we lose a few basis points across the book. Fund: Who owns the ledger? CTO: Priya does, she built it; we don't have a backup yet, it's on the roadmap. CFO: Retention's 121% net, churn's tiny at the top end.

failure_modes: picks growth over the real risk

rubric_notes: The headline finding is interchange exposure (CEO's own flag), not the growth.
